allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs","$env:APPDATA\\nvm","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm","C:\\nvm"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "FOUND: $p"; Get-ChildItem $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 Name } })

PowerShell($base = "C:\\Users\\admin\\dev\\mealplanner"; $dirs = @\("data\\uploads","data\\backups","data\\images","data\\feedback-exports","data\\frontend-dist","data\\maintenance-logs"\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { $full = Join-Path $base $d; if \(Test-Path $full\) { $items = Get-ChildItem $full -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $size = \($items | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; $count = $items.Count; "{0,-35} {1,8:N1} MB   \({2} files\)" -f $d, \($size/1MB\), $count } else { "{0,-35} not found" -f $d } })

PowerShell($logDir = "C:\\Users\\admin\\dev\\mealplanner\\backend\\logs"; if \(Test-Path $logDir\) { Get-ChildItem $logDir -File | ForEach-Object { "{0,-40} {1,6:N1} KB" -f $_.Name, \($_.Length/1KB\) }; "---RECENT ERRORS---"; Get-Content \(Join-Path $logDir "error.log"\) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Tail 20 } else { "No backend logs directory found at $logDir" })

PowerShell($testResults = "C:\\Users\\admin\\dev\\mealplanner\\frontend\\test-results"; if \(Test-Path $testResults\) { $old = Get-ChildItem $testResults -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -lt \(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-7\) }; "Old test artifacts \(>7 days\): $\($old.Count\) files"; $old | Select-Object -First 10 FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; if \($old.Count -gt 0\) { $old | Remove-Item -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Deleted $\($old.Count\) old test files" } } else { "No test-results directory found" }; $backupCount = \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\admin\\dev\\mealplanner\\data\\backups" -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count; "Backup count: $backupCount")
PowerShell(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe gh 2>$null; \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\))
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\" -Directory | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($token = \(git credential fill | Select-String "^password="\).Line -replace "^password=", ""; $headers = @{ Authorization = "token $token"; Accept = "application/vnd.github.v3+json" }; $labels = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/e2kd7n/mealplanner/labels?per_page=100" -Headers $headers; $labels | Select-Object name, color | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($env:PATH; Write-Host "---"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs", "$env:APPDATA\\npm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\pnpm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)
